name: Diffract CLI Commands
description: Diffract is our branded UI/CLI layer on top of NemoClaw. 'diffract' is a symlink to 'nemoclaw' — all commands identical. Setup: diffract onboard, diffract list, diffract status. Sandbox: diffract <name> connect/status/logs/policy-add/policy-list/destroy. Credentials: diffract credentials list/reset <KEY>. Services: diffract start/stop. Other: diffract debug, diffract uninstall, diffract --version. Web UI project is in nemoclaw-ui/ (Next.js, package name 'diffract').

title: Diffract is branded layer over NemoClaw + OpenShell
rationale: Diffract is our product name. CLI is a symlink (diffract -> nemoclaw). Web UI (Next.js) in nemoclaw-ui/ replaces interactive CLI with single-form deploy + dashboard. Underlying NemoClaw env vars (NEMOCLAW_*) preserved since that's what the CLI reads internally. Enterprise target: SSO, RBAC, multi-tenant planned.

name: chat-ws-loopback-reorigination-hop
description: Chat /chat WebSocket on the dashboard (port 9119) requires a LOOPBACK client peer (web_server.py _ws_client_is_allowed, a DNS-rebinding defence). Behind Caddy a plain host socat forwards from the docker BRIDGE IP -> non-loopback peer -> WS upgrade 403 -> chat dead. An openshell/ssh -L tunnel does NOT fix it: the dashboard is docker-exec'd into the CONTAINER netns while the openshell ssh session lands in the sandbox WORKLOAD netns -> tunnel binds but 502s (no listener there). FIX (transport-only, no rebuild): in-container socat hop re-originates from the container's own 127.0.0.1 so the dashboard sees a loopback peer. Chain host 127.0.0.1:9119 -> CONTAINER_IP:9118 (bridge) -> 127.0.0.1:9119 (in container). Host listener bound to 127.0.0.1 (Caddy dials loopback). Lives in setup.sh sandbox-port-forwarder.sh with an end-to-end curl keepalive. Caveat: behind a reverse proxy the peer is always the proxy, so this neutralises the peer check in effect; real gates are the per-session token + Origin check. Verified 403->101 through Caddy + survives cold systemctl restart (commit ee41c4b).

Dashboard /chat shows 'Chat unavailable: the ptyprocess package is missing' even though the WS handshake is 101. The embedded TUI chat (--tui) spawns a PTY via hermes_cli/pty_bridge.py needing ptyprocess; PtyBridge.spawn() raises PtyUnavailableError and web_server.py:3517 sends the error as a TEXT FRAME over an already-established socket -> WS 101 does NOT prove chat works (never discriminated this bug). Root cause: NemoClaw/agents/hermes/Dockerfile.base HERMES_UV_EXTRAS defaulted to 'messaging web' (no pty), so uv sync --frozen never installed the [pty] extra (uv.lock pins ptyprocess==0.7.0 under extra==pty). CHAT endpoint is /api/pty (NOT /api/ws).
resolution: (1) Dockerfile.base HERMES_UV_EXTRAS='messaging web pty' (root cause, baked on base rebuild, covers fresh client deploys); (2) setup.sh sandbox-port-forwarder.sh presence-checked idempotent 'pip install ptyprocess==0.7.0' before the --tui launch (self-heals containers recreated by redeploys without a rebuild; no-op once image carries pty). Verify by reading the post-101 frame on /api/pty: working chat streams terminal output (Diffract TUI banner), broken sends 'Chat unavailable'. Commit 41909ca.

name: dashboard-hermes-rebrand-safe-sweep
description:
Removing visible 'Hermes' from the dashboards. SAFE RULE: replace the standalone capital-H brand word with perl 's/\bHermes\b/Diffract/g' ONLY on pure-UI-text files: hermes/web/index.html (the <title>), hermes/web/src/i18n/*.ts (16 locales; word boundary spares camelCase KEYS like updateHermes/updatingHermes - only the VALUES change), hermes/web/src/themes/presets.ts ('Hermes Teal'). Plus targeted edits for the session-token error strings in hermes/web/src/lib/{api,gatewayClient}.ts and diffractui Dashboard.tsx ('Hermes Web Dashboard'). MUST NOT touch (a blanket sed corrupts these): the X-Hermes-Session-Token HTTP header (api.ts:31), window.__HERMES_* globals, HERMES_BASE_PATH, /api/hermes/* routes, HERMES_QWEN_ env prefix - all server/client contracts. Left truthful (real things, don't fake): the 
  NemoHermes  v0.0.50
  Deploy more secure, always-on AI assistants with a single command.

  Getting Started:
    nemohermes onboard                    Configure inference endpoint and credentials
    nemohermes onboard --from             Use a custom Dockerfile for the sandbox image

  Sandbox Management:
    nemohermes list                       List all sandboxes [--json]
    nemohermes <name> connect             Shell into a running sandbox [--probe-only]
    nemohermes <name> dashboard-url       Print the authenticated OpenClaw dashboard URL [--quiet|-q]
    nemohermes <name> recover             Restart the sandbox gateway and dashboard port-forward
    nemohermes <name> status              Sandbox health and NIM status
    nemohermes <name> exec                Run a command non-interactively in a running sandbox [--workdir <dir>] [--tty|--no-tty] [--timeout <s>] -- <cmd> [args...]
    nemohermes <name> doctor              Diagnose sandbox and gateway health [--json]
    nemohermes <name> logs                Stream sandbox logs [--follow] [--tail <lines>|-n <lines>] [--since <duration>]
    nemohermes <name> snapshot create     Create a snapshot of sandbox state [--name <name>]
    nemohermes <name> snapshot list       List available snapshots
    nemohermes <name> snapshot restore    Restore state from a snapshot [selector] [--to <dst>] [--force] [--yes|-y]
    nemohermes <name> share mount         Mount sandbox filesystem on the host [sandbox-path] [local-mount-point]
    nemohermes <name> share unmount       Unmount a shared sandbox filesystem [local-mount-point]
    nemohermes <name> share status        Show sandbox share mount status [local-mount-point]
    nemohermes <name> rebuild             Upgrade sandbox to current agent version [--yes|-y|--force] [--verbose|-v]
    nemohermes <name> gateway-token       Print the OpenClaw gateway auth token to stdout [--quiet|-q]
    nemohermes <name> destroy             Stop NIM and delete sandbox [--yes|-y|--force] [--cleanup-gateway|--no-cleanup-gateway]

  Skills:
    nemohermes <name> skill install       Deploy a skill directory to the sandbox <path>

  Policy Presets:
    nemohermes <name> policy-add          Add a network or filesystem policy preset (--yes, -y, --dry-run, --from-file <path>, --from-dir <path>)
    nemohermes <name> policy-remove       Remove an applied policy preset (--yes, -y, --dry-run)
    nemohermes <name> policy-list         List policy presets
    nemohermes <name> hosts-add           Add a sandbox /etc/hosts alias <hostname> <ip> [--dry-run]
    nemohermes <name> hosts-list          List sandbox host aliases
    nemohermes <name> hosts-remove        Remove a sandbox /etc/hosts alias (--dry-run)

  Messaging Channels:
    nemohermes <name> channels list       List supported messaging channels
    nemohermes <name> channels add <channel> Save messaging channel credentials and rebuild [--dry-run]
    nemohermes <name> channels remove <channel> Clear messaging channel credentials and rebuild [--dry-run]
    nemohermes <name> channels stop <channel> Disable channel without wiping credentials [--dry-run]
    nemohermes <name> channels start <channel> Re-enable a stopped messaging channel [--dry-run]

  Compatibility Commands:
    nemohermes setup                      Deprecated alias for nemohermes onboard
    nemohermes setup-spark                Deprecated alias for nemohermes onboard
    nemohermes deploy                     Deprecated Brev-specific bootstrap path

  Services:
    nemohermes tunnel start               Start the cloudflared public-URL tunnel
    nemohermes tunnel stop                Stop the cloudflared public-URL tunnel
    nemohermes start                      Deprecated alias for 'tunnel start'
    nemohermes stop                       Deprecated alias for 'tunnel stop'
    nemohermes inference get              Show the active NemoHermes inference route [--json]
    nemohermes status                     Show sandbox list and service status [--json]
    nemohermes inference set              Switch the NemoHermes inference model --provider <provider> --model <model> [--sandbox <name>] [--no-verify]

  Troubleshooting:
    nemohermes debug                      Collect diagnostics for bug reports [--quick] [--output FILE|-o FILE] [--sandbox NAME]

  Credentials:
    nemohermes credentials list           List stored credential providers
    nemohermes credentials reset          Remove a provider credential <PROVIDER> [--yes|-y]

  Backup:
    nemohermes backup-all                 Back up all sandbox state before upgrade

  Upgrade:
    nemohermes update                     Run the maintained NemoHermes installer update flow (--check, --yes|-y)
    nemohermes upgrade-sandboxes          Detect and rebuild stale sandboxes (--check, --auto, --yes|-y)

  Cleanup:
    nemohermes gc                         Remove orphaned sandbox Docker images (--yes|-y|--force, --dry-run)
    nemohermes uninstall                  Run uninstall.sh

  Uninstall flags:
    --yes                             Skip the confirmation prompt
    --keep-openshell                  Leave the openshell binary installed
    --delete-models                   Remove NemoHermes-pulled Ollama models

  Reconfiguration (after onboard):
    • Check inference route:   nemohermes inference get
    • Change inference model:  nemohermes inference set --model <model> --provider <provider>
    • Add network presets:     use the policy-add command on your sandbox
    • Change credentials:      credentials reset <PROVIDER>, then re-run onboard
    • Agent config is writable in the default sandbox so Hermes can manage runtime state.
      Use host-side commands or re-run onboard for durable Hermes settings.
      Run `nemohermes <name> shields up` to lock config for sensitive workloads.

  Powered by NVIDIA OpenShell · Nemotron · Agent Toolkit
  Credentials registered with the OpenShell gateway
  https://www.nvidia.com/nemoclaw CLI command (diffractui:301), ~/.hermes/* config paths +  command refs shown in Env/Config/Plugins/Skills screens, and code/CSS comments. tsc/npm-run-build catches any accidental key rename. DEPLOY CHAINS: agent dashboard (hermes/web) -> npm run build outputs to hermes_cli/web_dist; LIVE source of truth is the HOST agent dir /usr/local/lib/hermes-agent (forwarder docker-cp's its web_dist into the container on every restart), NOT the repo - rebuild there + docker cp into /opt/hermes/web_dist. diffractui runs  from the repo /root/diffract-main/diffractui - git pull + npm run build (.next) + systemctl restart diffractui. GOTCHA: setup.sh _overlay_host only copied web/src, not web/index.html, so the <title> survived the prior rebrand - fixed to copy index.html too. Verify by grepping the BUILT bundle/.next + the live served /agent/ title, not 'it built'. Commit 12a1cf9.
